title: Financial Housing Packing Rules
content:
Housing and Residence Life - Packing Guide and Rules
Morgan State University

---

WHAT TO BRING

Recommended Items:
- Bedding (Twin XL sheets)
- Towels and toiletries
- Desk lamp
- Storage containers
- School supplies
- Small refrigerator (4.5 cubic feet or less)
- Microwave (700 watts or less)

Prohibited Items:
- Candles and incense
- Hot plates and toasters
- Pets (except fish in small tank)
- Weapons
- Alcohol (all residence halls are dry)

---

OFFICE OF RESIDENCE LIFE CONTACT

For Room & Board refunds and housing questions, contact the Office of Residence Life.

Website: https://www.morgan.edu/residence-life
